posts.raw_content:
If you've been around mothers, particularly helicopter mothers (not of the attack variety), the vast majority of the time you will see that they believe their child can do no wrong. Even if they know their child did wrong, then it was someone else's fault, or society's fault, they will never not advocate for their kid even if they are the most evil scum on the planet. This is obviously evolutionarily adaptive, as making sure their child is successful by any means enhances their chances at reproduction.

What does this have to do with illegal immigration? Because these single childless women do not have kids, yet their maternal instinct can not be denied. It's why in nature it is very common to have mothers adopt abandoned kids from other parents (often due to death) if they do not have a kid of their own, it is a powerful instinct, it even crosses species sometimes. Well, childless leftist women in this country (and most western countries) have their maternal instinct diverted to "the less fortunate in society," who they treat as their surrogate children and will defend to the death. These women have been convinced by the news media and popular culture than illegal immigrants are the population that is most in need of their help, protection, and displaced motherhood instincts.

This means that no matter what these people do, including up to murder, it will never be their poor "child's" fault, it will always be society that is at fault. Their child is perfect, could never do anything wrong. This is why they will never be convinced. Anything short of them actually becoming mothers themselves will not convince these women that their precious perfect children could ever be in the wrong. It's useless to even try.
